header.description: Browse building records, meeting logs, circulars, and financial statements in one place.

documents.title: Renovation_Guidelines_2024.pdf
documents.description: Guidelines for unit renovation and contractor access approvals.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view represents a resident-readable summary of the renovation rules, approved working hours, deposit requirements, and contractor onboarding conditions.

documents.title: AGM_Minutes_Q4_2023.docx
documents.description: Minutes recorded during the fourth quarter annual general meeting.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view summarizes agenda items, voting outcomes, maintenance updates, and community decisions recorded during the AGM.

documents.title: Annual_Financial_Statement.xlsx
documents.description: Annual summary of account balances, maintenance collections, and expenses.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view provides a simplified summary of the statement, including maintenance income, sinking fund allocation, and major operating expenses.

documents.title: Lift_Modernization_Circular.pdf
documents.description: Announcement for elevator upgrade schedule and expected service impact.
documents.previewBody: This mocked in-app view outlines the modernization timeline, affected towers, and alternative access guidance for residents.

helpCard.description: Official hard copies of old deed records and structural blueprints can still be requested at the Concierge Desk.
